title: Hash-Chained Event
description: Reference schema for tamper-evident hash-chained event records emitted by lib/hash_chain.py::HashChainedLog. Documents the on-disk JSONL row shape (seq, prev_hash, event_hash, timestamp, event) so external auditors and replay tooling have a typed contract; the writer enforces invariants in code (lib/hash_chain.py) rather than by JSON-Schema validation, so this file currently has no automated $ref-loaded consumer. Listed in schemas/ONTOLOGY.md § 7 + § 10 + § 0 diagram.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number starting from 0

prev_hash.description: Hash of the previous event ('genesis' for first event)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when event was appended

event.description: The actual event payload (can be any valid JSON object)
